command: fastp --in1 D0110039_S01_L001_1.fastq.gz --in2 D0110039_S01_L001_2.fastq.gz --out1 D0110039_S01_L001_1.trim.fastq.gz --out2 D0110039_S01_L001_2.trim.fastq.gz --json D0110039_S01_L001.fastp.json --html D0110039_S01_L001.fastp.html --thread 2 --detect_adapter_for_pe --cut_front --cut_tail --trim_poly_x --cut_mean_quality 30 --qualified_quality_phred 30 --unqualified_percent_limit 10 --length_required 50 --adapter_fasta adapter.fasta
